title: Successful login lands in the main workspace
description: Verifies that a user can sign in from the login screen and reach the authenticated workspace with the main module visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select English from the language selector
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed
Verify the main module navigation is available

title: Authenticate and land in the correct workspace
description: This verifies that a user can sign in successfully from the home page and reach the main workspace after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the user field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the main workspace is displayed

title: Log in and reach the main workspace
description: This verifies that a valid user can sign in from the entry screen and land in the authenticated workspace with the correct module available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the main workspace is displayed
Verify the patient admission module is available

title: Five failed logins trigger account lockout
description: Verifies that repeated invalid sign-in attempts lock the account and present a lockout message.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with WrongPassword1
Submit the login form
Submit the login form four more times with the same invalid credentials
Verify a lockout message is visible

title: Switch between modules from the authenticated header
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open another module from the authenticated header and see that module displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the user field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open one module from the authenticated header
Switch to a different module from the authenticated header
Verify the newly selected module is displayed

title: Invalid login shows an error and failed attempt count
description: Verifies that invalid credentials are rejected and the user sees an error with the failed attempt count updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with WrongPassword1
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible
Verify the failed attempt count is displayed

title: Change the login language and keep it on refresh
description: This verifies that the login screen language selection can be changed and remains selected after refreshing the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a different language on the login screen
Refresh the page
Verify the selected language remains active on the login screen

title: Document an encounter with anamnesis, SOAP notes, diagnosis, and signature
description: This verifies that a clinician can build a complete encounter record and save it to the patient history.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the electronic health record module
Fill in the anamnesis fields
Record the vital signs
Write the SOAP notes
Search and select a CID-10 diagnosis
Save the encounter
Sign the clinical document
Verify the clinical record is added to the patient history
Verify the document is signed
